contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Onboarding-playbook addendum to CREDENTIALING_PROGRAM_PAGES.md
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/147
  
  Details:
  Added a file-by-file playbook for onboarding a new credentialing program (CREDENTIALING_PROGRAM_PAGES.md §16). The doc had the design spec (URL shape, file layout, manifest schema, co-branding pattern) but no step-by-step "I'm onboarding partner X tomorrow — here's the sequence."
  
  Covers:
  - Picking program_slug (URL slug, permanent — etched in printed QR codes) vs. membership_filter.primary_program (lineage-credentials side, may differ)
  - Copy an existing program directory as scaffold; do NOT touch JS — runtime is shared via js/program-shell.js
  - Manifest fields, exact HTML strings to update, programs.html card pattern (CTA text "View program →" per the 2026-05-16 UX fix in truesight_me_beta#110)
  - Local verification (python3 -m http.server), PR → merge → gh repo sync prod, ignore the pre-existing Visual Consistency Tests CI failure
  - What happens when the first cohort member appears, pointer to Phase 3a (§15) for per-program QR+PDF, printed-cert QR generation deferred to first physical print
  
  Bumped §14 Last reviewed to record the addendum.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/147
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
